title: Chamaefilix lobulata
taxonomy: Chamaefilix lobulata is classified as a species of fern in the genus Chamaefilix. This genus is part of the family Hymenophyllaceae, which is a group of small to medium-sized, usually epiphytic ferns. The Hymenophyllaceae family is further classified under the order Hymenophyllales, an order of ferns that are known for their delicate, often tropical appearance. The Hymenophyllales order is within the class Polypodiopsida, which includes a wide variety of ferns. The classification of Chamaefilix lobulata is as follows: Kingdom Plantae, Division Pteridophyta, Class Polypodiopsida, Order Hymenophyllales, Family Hymenophyllaceae, Genus Chamaefilix, Species C. lobulata.
uses: Chamaefilix lobulata is a type of lycopodiophyte that has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
